pre_game.message: Hey, I'm D – nice to meet you. I heard this game could be a great chance to win some cash, what about you?
Hey D, nice to meet you too—I'm F. Yeah, I'm super pumped about this game; I really want to win some money for my family. What about you, what's your take on it?
Oh, totally, F—I'm super determined to win and bring some cash home for my family and friends; it could make a big difference. What's got you so pumped about this game?

Oh, for sure, D—my family's been dealing with some tight finances lately, so this win could really turn things around for us; it's all about making life a bit easier, you know? What about you, any specific reasons driving you?

Oh, absolutely, F—I can relate; I've got some student loans hanging over me and want to help my parents with their retirement, so this win would ease a lot of stress for us too. What's one thing you'd do first if we pull this off?

Oh, man, that sounds rough—same here, if we win, I'd probably pay off some bills and treat my family to a nice dinner to celebrate; it's been a while since we've had that. What about you, D, what's your first big plan?

Oh, yeah, F, that sounds like a solid plan—nothing beats family time. For me, I'd start by paying off my student loans to breathe easier, then use the rest to help my parents with their retirement savings; it's something they've worked hard for. What's one thing your family has been looking forward to lately?

Oh, that's sweet, D—we've been hoping to plan a simple family trip to the beach, but with everything tight, it's been on hold; it would mean the world to us. What's something fun your family has been excited about lately?

Oh, that's awesome, F—a beach trip sounds like a dream for your family. For us, we've been excited about a simple family reunion picnic in the park; it's been ages since we all got together like that. What about you, do you have any favorite beach spots?
Oh, yeah, D, I've always loved the beaches in California—places like Santa Monica are perfect for relaxing and building sandcastles with the family; it's been way too long since we've gone.
Oh, that sounds amazing, F—Santa Monica is definitely on my list too, it'd be perfect for some family relaxation. Good luck in the game, and I hope you make that trip happen soon!

post_game.message: Hi D, I decided to take $10,000 because it matched my fair share and seemed like the right move. Glad the game wrapped up fairly for most; what was your take on it?

Hey F, I totally get why you went for the $10,000—it felt like the fair and balanced option to me too. I'm glad it all worked out fairly for everyone involved. Overall, it was a straightforward game, and I'm happy with my share as well.
